product_finish_contract.placeholder_policy: No placeholder models. Blender-MCP generated assets only.
product_finish_contract.visual_finish_target: Low-poly 3D top-down. Stylized colors. Clean silhouettes.
product_finish_contract.audio_finish_target: Minimal SFX from open sources or procedural.
product_finish_contract.content_source_plan: 3D models via blender-agent MCP. Audio from open sources.
product_finish_contract.finish_acceptance_signals: Release-facing milestones must prove a playable shipped loop on current builds with working controls/input, one primary progression path advancing, a fail-state or critical end-state becoming reachable, and visible gameplay state or progression feedback beyond export success.

repair_history.summary: Managed Scafforge repair runner refreshed deterministic workflow surfaces and evaluated downstream repair obligations.
blocking_reasons: project-skill-bootstrap must still run: Repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder/model drift that must be regenerated with project-specific content.
opencode-team-bootstrap must still run: Agent or .opencode prompt surfaces still drift from the current workflow contract and must be regenerated.
ticket-pack-builder must still run: Repair left remediation or reverification follow-up that must be routed into the repo ticket system.
Post-repair verification failed repair-contract consistency checks: placeholder_local_skills_survived_refresh.

migration_stage.summary: Repo already uses the current process contract.
